input: Hey, just wanted to check on my order #1035. When should I expect it to arrive?
output:
Subject: Your Order #1035 Delivery Update

Hi Jordan,

Thanks for reaching out about your order! 

Great news — your order #1035 was successfully delivered on February 20th to 88 Maple St, Denver, CO 80203. It should be waiting for you there.

If you haven't received it yet, I'd suggest checking with neighbors or around your delivery area, as sometimes packages get placed in less obvious spots for security.

If you still can't locate your order after checking, just let me know and we'll work together to resolve this quickly.

Is there anything else I can help you with today?

Best,
Vitalize Support
